nodes.label: Minimalism Baseline Config (DESIGN_VARIANCE:3, MOTION:2, DENSITY:3)
nodes.rationale: Deliberate, edited, expensive-feeling — not empty. Whitespace is structure not absence. Palette: paper, bone, chalk, ash, warm gray, off-black, matte mineral neutrals. Motion almost invisible: quiet reveals, subtle hover tightening. No glassmorphism, loud gradients, endless card stacks.
